critical_steps.task: Confirm the genuineness of the fire and ascertain the location of smoke/fire.
Activate the Fire Protection System and trigger the fire alarm bells/siren if necessary.
Try to use a Portable Fire Extinguisher (PFE) to put out the fire if safe to do so.
Put on the Escape Hood if necessary.
Ensure the fire pump has started automatically and arrange for a manual start if required.
Activate Station Evacuation Mode on IBP/SMS/MCS/DIBP/ILCP if necessary.
Inform TC of incident details: site, casualties, equipment damage, emergency service needs, evacuation arrangement, assembly point.
Arrange Station Staff escorting FSD officials with cue card within 6 mins.
Inform all staff members to switch HPR to line mode.
Summon assistance from FMD.
Activate proper smoke extraction/emergency ventilation mode after communication with ESC.
Switch off air-conditioning inside SCR to avoid infiltration of smoke, if necessary.
Arrange staff to manually switch off/close the Town Gas/LPG supply, if necessary.
Inform all working parties including Back of House areas for emergency evacuation.
Inform the annexed Buildings' Management Offices of the incident.
Open Manual Service Gates/Emergency Service Gate/Emergency Escape Gates/Emergency Exit Gates/Emergency Exit Door to accelerate evacuation process.
Open designated entrance/night access door or alternative entrance/night access door. Evacuation via track if no entrance available.
Inform all working parties to evacuate to the designated assembly point.
Crosscheck station equipment for evacuation readiness: PA, AFC Gates, Emergency Signage, PIDS.
Crosscheck with ESC to make sure proper ECS Mode has been operated.
Set up Incident Control Post at proper location.
Take up IO duty before DSM arrival.
Set up a temporary telephone line at the ICP.
Escort emergency services to the incident site.
Head-count personnel of working parties at assembly point and report to IO.
Operate ECS Mode after evacuation to drain away smoke if platform doors are installed.
